creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit in branch main references this bug:

URL: https://cgit.FreeBSD.org/ports/commit/?id=5b60fcdb18e3e5bb5ae813ee4e82dfb7de997df2

commit 5b60fcdb18e3e5bb5ae813ee4e82dfb7de997df2
Author:     Emanuel Haupt <ehaupt@FreeBSD.org>
AuthorDate: 2021-09-08 21:28:02 +0000
Commit:     Emanuel Haupt <ehaupt@FreeBSD.org>
CommitDate: 2021-09-08 21:28:45 +0000

    net-mgmt/gnu-ipcalc: Update to 1.0.1

    - Upstream has move to GitLab
    - Use meson instead of gmake
    - Optionally support GeoIP1 + GeoIP2 via net/libmaxminddb

    PR:             258363 (based on)
    Reported by:    freebsd@ohreally.nl
